languages.text: {n}И без того резкие черты лица Астартес каменеют еще сильнее, превращая его в подобие статуи.{/n} "Потому что мой долг — в служении Империуму, пока кровь Сангвиния течет в моих жилах. И ты поможешь мне исполнить его, так или иначе".

{n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."
languages.original_text: {n}И без того резкие черты лица Астартес каменеют еще сильнее, превращая его в подобие статуи.{/n} "Потому что мой долг — в служении Империуму, пока кровь Сангвиния течет в моих жилах. И ты поможешь мне исполнить его, так или иначе".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

{n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

{n}The Space Marine reels in shock.{/n} "Why...? Well. If serving the Emperor isn't reason enough for you to help, perhaps the preservation of a holy relic will carry more weight. The sword on my belt is a reliquary sword. It can cleave through unholy metal bodies as easily as living flesh. If my life is cut short, it will be destroyed with me. If I survive, it will be yours."

{n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

{n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

languages.text: {n}スペースマリーンは衝撃でよろめく.{/n} 「なぜ…？ まあ、もし皇帝に仕えることが君を助ける理由として十分でなければ、聖なる遺物を守るということがより重くのしかかるかもしれない。私の腰に差した剣は遺物剣だ。それは生きた肉と同じように、不浄な金属の体も容易に切り裂くことができる。もし私が命を落とせば、剣も私と共に破壊される。もし私が生き残れば、君のものになる。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Space Marine reels in shock.{/n} "Why...? Well. If serving the Emperor isn't reason enough for you to help, perhaps the preservation of a holy relic will carry more weight. The sword on my belt is a reliquary sword. It can cleave through unholy metal bodies as easily as living flesh. If my life is cut short, it will be destroyed with me. If I survive, it will be yours."

traits.locale_text: {n}スペースマリーンは衝撃でよろめく.{/n} 「なぜ…？ まあ、もし皇帝に仕えることが君を助ける理由として十分でなければ、聖なる遺物を守るということがより重くのしかかるかもしれない。私の腰に差した剣は遺物剣だ。それは生きた肉と同じように、不浄な金属の体も容易に切り裂くことができる。もし私が命を落とせば、剣も私と共に破壊される。もし私が生き残れば、君のものになる。」

languages.text: {n}Los severos rasgos del Astartes se endurecen aún más, haciedo que parezca una estatua.{/n} «Porque es mi deber servir al Imperium mientras la sangre de Sanguinius recorra mis venas. Y me ayudarás a hacerlo, de un modo u otro».
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

traits.locale_text: {n}Los severos rasgos del Astartes se endurecen aún más, haciedo que parezca una estatua.{/n} «Porque es mi deber servir al Imperium mientras la sangre de Sanguinius recorra mis venas. Y me ayudarás a hacerlo, de un modo u otro».

languages.text: {n}这位阿斯塔特本就线条分明的面容绷得更紧了，看上去就像一尊雕像。{/n}“因为只要圣吉列斯的血还在我血管里流淌，为帝国效命就是我的职责。而你也会帮我完成，不管你愿意与否。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

traits.locale_text: {n}这位阿斯塔特本就线条分明的面容绷得更紧了，看上去就像一尊雕像。{/n}“因为只要圣吉列斯的血还在我血管里流淌，为帝国效命就是我的职责。而你也会帮我完成，不管你愿意与否。”

languages.text: {n}Die ohnehin scharfen Gesichtszüge des Astartes werden noch härter und lassen ihn wie eine Statue erscheinen.{/n} "Weil es meine Pflicht ist, dem Imperium zu dienen, solange das Blut von Sanguinius in meinen Adern pulsiert. Und Ihr werdet mir helfen, sie zu erfüllen. So oder so."
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die ohnehin scharfen Gesichtszüge des Astartes werden noch härter und lassen ihn wie eine Statue erscheinen.{/n} "Weil es meine Pflicht ist, dem Imperium zu dienen, solange das Blut von Sanguinius in meinen Adern pulsiert. Und Ihr werdet mir helfen, sie zu erfüllen. So oder so."

languages.text: {n}Astartes'in zaten keskin olan hatları, daha da sertleşerek onu oyulmuş bir heykele benzetiyor.{/n} "Çünkü vazifem, damarlarımda Sanguinius'un kanı aktığı sürece İmparatorluk'a hizmet etmektir. Öyle ya da böyle bunu yerine getirmeme yardım edeceksin."
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

traits.locale_text: {n}Astartes'in zaten keskin olan hatları, daha da sertleşerek onu oyulmuş bir heykele benzetiyor.{/n} "Çünkü vazifem, damarlarımda Sanguinius'un kanı aktığı sürece İmparatorluk'a hizmet etmektir. Öyle ya da böyle bunu yerine getirmeme yardım edeceksin."

languages.text: {n}Le visage aux traits anguleux du membre de l'Astartes se fige encore davantage, lui donnant l'apparence d'une statue.{/n} « Car il en va de mon devoir de servir l'Imperium tant que le sang de Sanguinius coule dans mes veines. Et vous m'aiderez à accomplir ma tâche, d'une manière ou d'une autre. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes's already sharp features harden further, making him resemble a carved statue.{/n} "Because my duty is to serve the Imperium while the blood of Sanguinius still courses through my veins. And you will help me to carry it out, one way or another."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage aux traits anguleux du membre de l'Astartes se fige encore davantage, lui donnant l'apparence d'une statue.{/n} « Car il en va de mon devoir de servir l'Imperium tant que le sang de Sanguinius coule dans mes veines. Et vous m'aiderez à accomplir ma tâche, d'une manière ou d'une autre. »
